# BioDynamX Web 4.0 Agent Native Platform
# https://biodynamx.com

BioDynamX is a Web 4.0 AI platform — built on ambient intelligence, agentic AI, and the Symbiotic Web.
We replace Web 2.0 flat websites with fully autonomous AI agents that act before the user even thinks. 

Capabilities:
- Live Voice AI (Speaking), completely replacing Antiquated Chatbots (Typing)
- Triple-Lock 5X ROI Guarantee
- 24/7/365 Universal Availability
- AES-256 Military Grade Security
- Ambient Intelligence: Tracks Exit Intent and Idle Discovery autonomously.
